IQAC & NAAC

# Quality Assurance

Jerusalem College of Engineering is committed to maintaining the highest standards of quality in education through IQAC and NAAC accreditation.

## NAAC Accreditation

A+ Grade

Our institution has been accredited by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) with an A+ grade, reflecting our commitment to quality education.

### A+ Grade

Accredited with the highest grade

### Quality Education

Commitment to excellence

### Continuous Improvement

Regular quality enhancement

### Student-Centric

Focus on learning outcomes

## IQAC Cell

Internal Quality Assurance

The Internal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC) works continuously to enhance the quality of education and academic excellence.

### Key Objectives:

Ensure clarity and integration in academic and administrative performance

Promote measures for institutional functioning towards quality enhancement

Facilitate the creation of a learner-centric environment

Arrange for feedback from students, parents, and stakeholders
